channel.title: Salesforce on prasanthabr
channel.description: Recent content in Salesforce on prasanthabr

item.title: So why would you use Workflows at all now?!
item.description: tl;dr Workflows are quirky in their execution. Custom validations are not triggered on a workflow update, while a process builder triggers custom validations. Key Challenge: reminding oneself of things you know as you become more familiar with newer tools and their behaviour. Key Note: Designing based on quirks should be considered an anti-pattern. Background Salesforce with its emphasis on building low code tools, had been pampering admins with tools allow for more sophisticated solutions without the use of Developer skills or time.

item.title: Attribute based Password Policies
item.description: tl;dr How can we define geography specific password policies for external users on Salesforce Communities. Use Case Background For a global organization leveraging Salesforce.com to expose enterprise data and applications to its community of partners, in addition to the policies that guide access to the instance for its internal users, there is the added dimension of policies that are cognizant of the agreements and contracts that the organization has signed with its individual partners.

item.title: Subtract Months from Date in Salesforce.com Formula Fields
item.description: This is reproduced from https://success.salesforce.com/ideaview?id=08730000000BrQ2AAK This is a good baseplate for creating date subtraction formulas on Salesforce DATE ( /*YEAR*/ YEAR ( EndDate ) - FLOOR( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c / 12) - IF (MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) > 0, 0, 1), /*MONTH*/ IF (MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD ( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) > 0, MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD ( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12), MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD ( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) + 12), /*DAY*/ MIN (DAY ( EndDate ), CASE ( /* Month */ IF (MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD ( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) > 0, MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD ( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12), MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD ( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) + 12), 9, 30, 4, 30, 6, 30, 11, 30, 2, /* return max days for February dependent on if end date is leap year */ IF (MOD (YEAR ( EndDate ) - FLOOR( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c / 12) - IF (MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) > 0, 0, 1), 400) = 0 || (MOD (YEAR ( EndDate ) - FLOOR( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c / 12) - IF (MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) > 0, 0, 1) ,4) = 0 && MOD (YEAR ( EndDate ) - FLOOR( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c / 12) - IF (MONTH ( EndDate ) - MOD( Notice_for_Client_to_Terminate_months__c , 12) > 0, 0, 1) ,100) <> 0 ), 29, 28), 31) ) )
